title: Bronwenia longipilifera
taxonomy: Bronwenia longipilifera is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is native to Brazil and is a member of the genus Bronwenia, which is part of the family Rubiaceae. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The family Rubiaceae contains over 150 genera and 13,000 species, many of which are native to tropical regions. Bronwenia longipilifera is a rare species and further research is needed to classify its exact relationships within the family.

Its medicinal uses are largely anecdotal and based on local knowledge, which may include treating fever, rheumatism, and other health conditions.
